description: Synthetic seriousness of the wrong or harm
interpretive_warning: Not a real case severity score

description: Synthetic perceived responsibility of the wrongdoer
interpretive_warning: Not a legal or clinical responsibility assessment

description: Synthetic need to publicly reaffirm violated norms
interpretive_warning: Norm reaffirmation can be symbolic if not linked to repair

description: Synthetic acknowledgment or truth-telling by wrongdoer or institution
interpretive_warning: Words alone do not equal repair
Amends must be tied to material and relational context

description: Synthetic ongoing threat or unresolved harm
interpretive_warning: High threat may make forgiveness unsafe or premature

description: Synthetic trust in institutions or procedures
interpretive_warning: Trust depends on legitimacy accountability and history

description: Synthetic recognition of harmed person or group standing
interpretive_warning: Recognition should not be performed without agency

description: Synthetic structural or institutional reform effort
interpretive_warning: Reform must be evaluated in context

description: Synthetic probability of forgiveness under modeled conditions
interpretive_warning: Not a victim expectation or moral requirement
Not an assessment of real healing or justice
